source_chain.note: Time-domain accelerometer records from the centrifuge tests.

Canonical frequency table produced by the analysis1 Welch-PSD pipeline (T1 uses free-decay; T2-T5 use Welch). Filtered to series T1/T2/T4/T5 and baseline+scour stages (backfill rows dropped) for parity with the fig14 presentation.
This file. 16 rows (4 per series). Backfill stages dropped. SD column is NaN for saturated series (not present in source CSV).

processing_script: inline extractor (see repo git log for the build commit)
notes: Known discrepancy between this file and effect-saturation-script.parquet: T1's f1_model_hz differs by ~0.2 Hz at baseline (10.960 vs 11.200). The script's values predate the analysis1 pipeline; the CSV's values are the current canonical. Do not attempt to reconcile without explicit user direction — see CLAUDE.md 'no invent data'.
SD missing for T4/T5 is a structural gap in the CSV. Use this parquet only for dry-pair (T1, T2) slope computation; saturated-pair slopes require an auxiliary SD source.
